title: How to Get a Police Certificate - Paraguay - Canada.ca
content:
## How to Get a Police Certificate - Paraguay
If you need to give your fingerprints for a police certificate, this isn’t the same as giving your biometrics (fingerprints and photo) for an application.

## Name of the document you need
Certificado de Antecedentes

## Police certificate and IRCC requirements
You must provide a police certificate when you apply for:
- some temporary residence programs
Check your application package or instructions for details.

### If you are a citizen of Paraguay

#### If you live in Paraguay
Apply online (in Spanish only) or at the Policía Nacional, Departamento de Identificaciones in Asunción in person or through a representative authorized in writing to act on your behalf.

#### If you live outside of Paraguay
Apply through the Paraguayan embassy or consulate, or you can fax or mail a copy of your cedula and a written authorization to a close relative (your father, mother, son, daughter or spouse) to apply on your behalf. Instructions and more information is available on the Government of Paraguay website (in Spanish only).

### If you are not a citizen of Paraguay

#### If you live in Paraguay
Apply at the Policía Nacional, Departamento de Identificaciones in Asunción in person or through a representative authorized in writing to act on your behalf. Instructions and more information is available on the Government of Paraguay website (in Spanish only).

#### If you live outside of Paraguay
Apply through the Paraguayan embassy or consulate.

### Special considerations
Only certificates issued by the National Police headquarters ( Policia Nacional ) are accepted. Certificates issued by any other federal/provincial government offices are not accepted.
Policia Nacional Call Centre: (+595 976) 200472 Email: dpto.identificaciones@pn.gov.py or dpto.identificaciones.pn@gmail.com
